cantonal_cardinality.evidence: SYSTEM_CORE/DOCTRINE_MGMT sub-hub contains 1 CANONICAL (doctrine.doctrine_library) + 1 ERROR (doctrine.doctrine_library_error) + 2 REGISTRY (doctrine.doctrine_key, ctb.table_registry). Within cardinality limit of 1 CANONICAL + 1 ERROR + 0-2 SUPPORTING per sub-hub.

registry_first.evidence: All 4 tables (ctb.table_registry, doctrine.doctrine_library, doctrine.doctrine_key, doctrine.doctrine_library_error) are registered in ctb.table_registry with correct hub_id, subhub_id, and leaf_type. No unregistered tables in ctb or doctrine schemas.

id_authority.evidence: doctrine.doctrine_library uses UUID PK (gen_random_uuid) + TEXT UNIQUE doctrine_id (format: {DOMAIN}-{MAJOR}.{MINOR}-{SEQ}). doctrine.doctrine_key uses BIGINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY. ctb.table_registry uses BIGINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY. doctrine.doctrine_library_error uses BIGINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY. All IDs are system-minted, no external ID authority.

no_sideways_calls.evidence: ctb and doctrine schemas have no foreign keys to other schemas. All cross-schema references are by-value only (ctb.table_registry.table_schema/table_name reference other schemas' tables by value, not FK). No triggers that write to other schemas.

contracts_declared.evidence: DDL contract: migrations/006_ctb_doctrine_tables.sql. Column dictionaries: docs/schema/CTB_DOCTRINE_TABLES.md. Schema diff: changesets/outbox/wp-20260303-ctb-doctrine-db-scope-correction/db/schema_diff.json. All constraints, indexes, and triggers declared in migration file.
